visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens on a bright, snowy ski slope under a clear sky with a visible ski lift and distant trees. A man in yellow overalls and a pink undershirt stands near another man in a grey hoodie, black pants, and a green-lensed helmet who is mounted on a snowboard. A small child in a pink jacket is seated on the board between the snowboarder's legs. The man in yellow points to his own leg with an exaggerated, comedic facial expression. (2) The man in yellow sits down on the front part of the snowboard, positioning himself directly between the snowboarder's legs and the child, creating a vertical stack of three people. He holds a smartphone in his right hand to record himself. The lighting is bright and natural daylight, casting clear shadows on the snow. (3) The snowboard begins to descend the slope. The camera shifts to a selfie POV angle, showing the face of the man in yellow up close as he laughs and screams. The background becomes a blur of snow and movement. A child's face is partially visible next to him, also smiling. (4) A wide shot from behind captures the three-person stack sliding down the hill. A few other skiers are visible in the distance on the wide, groomed trail. The man in yellow continues to film with his phone while the snowboarder maintains balance and control from the back. (5) The final phase shows more close-up selfie shots of the group. The man in yellow and the snowboarder both look into the camera, making peace signs and laughing as they reach the bottom of the run.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV：當滑雪蔡教練有三隻大腿

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main characters (2 adult males, 1 child), 3 distant skiers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One male in yellow overalls and a pink shirt; one male in a grey hoodie, helmet, and goggles; one child in a pink winter jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A vast, open snowy ski slope with groomed tracks, evergreen trees on the perimeter, and a functional ski lift with chairs moving.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal male vocals dominate. One speaker shouts 'Dàtuǐ' (thigh) repeatedly with a comedic, strained inflection. A background child's laugh is audible. Ambient wind floor is present. (2) A muffled percussive impact occurs as someone sits down. The voices become more rapid, speaking in short, breathless bursts. (3) A loud, continuous broadband friction noise begins, signifying the snowboard sliding on snow. The vocals transition to high-pitched screaming and ecstatic cheering ('Wooo!'). Wind noise increases in intensity due to movement. (4) The sliding friction sound continues with varying frequency as the speed changes. Voices are heard shouting 'Yawai!' and laughing hysterically. The acoustic environment is bright and noisy with wind and snow textures. (5) The sliding noise subsides as the group slows down. The primary speaker shouts a final celebratory phrase with a high-rising intonation, followed by clear laughter from all three participants.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Setup -> Comedic Performance -> Action Sequence -> Payoff
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a humorous and unconventional snowboarding stunt, highlighting the camaraderie and fun of the group.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'POV' trope to set up a joke about a snowboarder having 'three legs' by stacking people on the board. The high audio energy and chaotic selfie-style filming are characteristic of viral short-form social media content.
